nameOfCommonIngredientsGlossary: (Camphor/Cedrus Libani/Salvadora Persica Bark)/(Garlic/Onion Bulb)/(Date/Gourd/Grape/Lentil/Olive/Punica Granatum Fruit)/(Fig Fruit/Leaf)/Acacia Seyal Gum/(Basil/Ziziphus Spina-Christi Leaf)/Ginger Root/Punica Granatum Pericarp/Brassica Nigra Seed/(Onion Skin)/Cucumber Extract
chemicalDescription: This is the extract of the bark of Cinnamomum camphora (camphor), Cedrus libani, and Salvadora persica; the bulbs of Allium sativum (garlic); the bulbs and skin of Allium cepa (onion); the fruits of Phoenix dactylifera (date), Cucurbitaceae, Vitis vinifera (grape), Lens culinaris (lentil), and Olea europaea (olive); the fruit and leaves of Ficus carica (fig); Acacia Seyal Gum (q.v.), the leaves of Ocimum basilicum (basil) and Ziziphus spina-christi; the pericarp of Punica granatum; the roots of Zingiber officinale (ginger); the seeds of Brassica nigra, and the whole plant, Cucumis sativus (cucumber).
inciName: (CAMPHOR/CEDRUS LIBANI/SALVADORA PERSICA BARK)/(GARLIC/ONION BULB)/(DATE/GOURD/GRAPE/LENTIL/OLIVE/PUNICA GRANATUM FRUIT)/(FIG FRUIT/LEAF)/ACACIA SEYAL GUM/(BASIL/ZIZIPHUS SPINA-CHRISTI LEAF)/GINGER ROOT/PUNICA GRANATUM PERICARP/BRASSICA NIGRA SEED/(ONION SKIN)/CUCUMBER EXTRACT
